roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT PC17(B) PETITION TO REDUCE FILED
DEF MOT FOR FORMAL BAIL HEARING & ORDER RELEASING DEF ON OR;FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/AMEND:1 TO REFLECT A VIOLATION OF 594(B)2(A) PC,A MISDEMEANOR/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1 AND 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:STATUS OF HOSP ADMISSION/DAWT/X:PER DEP PUB DEF SOLOMON, DEFT WAS ADMITTED TO SFGH IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURT'S ORDER,/VD:PRELIM HEARING DATE OF 09-12-17/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPC/

/CAL:RULING ON BAIL MOTION/X:THE MOTION IS GRANTED,/OR/CTORD: DEFENDANTRELEASED ON OR ON HOME DETENTION AT SAN FRANCISCO  GENERAL HOSPITAL OR LAGUNA HONDA HOSPITAL,/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF DEFT'S RELEASE ON OR, DEFT ISREQUIRED, IMMEDIATELY UPON RELEASE, TO REPORT TO THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT FOR THE PURPOSE OF BEING FITTED WITH A GPS ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE,/CTORD: AS A FURTHER CONDITION OF RELEASE ON OR, AFTER BEING FITTED WITH A GPS ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE, DEFT IS TO IMMEDIATELY REPORTTO SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOR CONTINUED TREATMENT OF HIS BACK AND ARM CONDITIONS,/CTORD: AS A FURTHER CONDITION OF RELEASE ON OR, DEFT IS ADMONISHED THAT SHOULD HE REMOVE THE GPS MONITORING DEVICE OR IN ANY OTHER WAYINTERFERE WITHITS PROPER OPERATION OR IT BE DETERMINED THAT HE IS NOT PRESENT AT SFGH OR LAGUNA HONDA HOSPITAL, THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERRIF'S DEPT IS AUTHORIZED TO IMMEDIATELY DETAIN AND ARREST DEFENDANT AND RETURN DEFT TO CUSTODY,/CONTD: STATUS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/DOPU:HIS ADMISSION TO SAN  FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL OR LAGUNA HONDA HOSPITAL/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE DEFENDANT IS STILL IN HOSPITAL,/X: THISCASE IS ON LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOPC/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 09-15-17/987,2/ACM/CTORD: UNDER THE DIRECTION OF ACM, DEFENDANT IS TO PARTICIPATE IN SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSELING/ /CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:BAIL MOTION/X:ARGUMENT TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION/CONTD:RULING ON BAIL MOTION/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:45 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: TIME ESTIMATE IS ONE HOUR,/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL: 40000/BWNUM: 1ST/NIGHTSERV/
